title: yap.json
description: Schema for YAP (Yet Another Packager) multi-package project files. A yap.json describes a collection of PKGBUILD-based projects built together for a target distribution.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this JSON Schema for editor validation/autocomplete.

name.description: Logical name of the project collection.

description.description: Human-readable description of the project collection.

buildDir.description: Directory where build artifacts and intermediate files are produced.

output.description: Directory where the final packages are written.

projects.description: Ordered list of sub-projects (each containing a PKGBUILD) to build.

name.description: Sub-directory name (relative to the yap.json location) containing the project's PKGBUILD. Must not start with '.' or './'.

install.description: If true, the built package is installed immediately after building, before subsequent projects build (useful for intra-collection build dependencies).

description.description: Optional human-readable note for the sub-project. Not consumed by the builder (the PKGBUILD's pkgdesc is authoritative); useful for documenting intent in yap.json.

signing.description: Package signing configuration. Note: keys are PascalCase (the struct has no JSON tags). Key/passphrase resolution can also be driven by CLI flags and environment variables; see docs.

Enabled.description: Whether signing is active for this build.

KeyPath.description: Absolute path to the private key (PEM for RSA/APK, ASCII-armored for GPG/DEB/RPM/Pacman).

Passphrase.description: Passphrase for the private key. Prefer environment variables over committing this.

KeyName.description: Optional key name, used for APK key naming (e.g. "mykey").

repos.description: Additional package repositories to configure before resolving build/runtime dependencies.

suite.description: APT suite/codename (e.g. "jammy"). Ignored for non-APT formats.

components.description: APT components (e.g. ["main", "universe"]). Ignored for non-APT formats.

keyURL.description: URL of the repository signing key to import.

distros.description: Restrict this repo to specific distro keys (e.g. ["ubuntu", "rocky"]). Empty means all.

format.description: Force a specific repository format. Normally inferred from the target distro.

gpgCheck.description: Enable GPG signature verification for this repository.

skipDeps.description: Package names to omit from makedepends installation.

targetArch.description: Cross-compilation target architecture (e.g. "arm64", "aarch64"). Empty means native host arch.

debugDir.description: Directory to capture per-step build debug artifacts.

parallel.description: Build independent projects in parallel. Default is sequential (file order).

sbom.description: Generate Software Bill of Materials for each artifact.

sbomFormat.description: SBOM format(s) to emit when sbom is enabled.
